points: A small, cost-effective LLM was used to prune context chunks in question-answering systems.
The model successfully discarded 68% of unnecessary chunks.
The pruning process maintained 96% recall, improving efficiency.
Trump's investment platform for kids is now live.
Nasdaq is fast-tracking SpaceX's inclusion to increase its exposure to passive investors.
FIFA's reversal of a red card against Folarin Balogun highlights issues with institutional accountability.
The incident serves as a warning about the dangers of forfeiting the benefit of the doubt.
This has implications beyond sports, including for institutions like the Trump administration.
Maine's Democratic Senate nominee Graham Platner faces reconsideration of his candidacy after a sexual assault accusation from 2021.
The accusation was made by a woman who claims Platner sexually assaulted her.
Platner is taking time to reassess his next steps following the allegation.
The frustration with staying informed led to the creation of 1440.
It aimed to provide a solution by gathering information in one place.
The goal was to make staying informed quick, taking only five minutes.
ByteDance to launch Dreamina Seedance 2.5 model on July 9.
Fable offers a beginner's guide for storytelling.
OpenAI is preparing for the GPT-5.6 release.
